# Tensorbinge

Open research collective building tools at the intersection of machine
learning, quantitative finance, and systems engineering.

## Products

### Ticklog
High-performance logging library for Rust. ~10 ns per call with
lock-free per-thread buffers and a background drain thread — built
for HFT and latency-sensitive systems.
https://crates.io/crates/ticklog

### Simulor
Event-driven quantitative backtesting framework. Simulate strategies
against historical data with realistic execution models.
https://pypi.org/project/simulor/

## Research

### Machine Learning
Deep learning theory, optimization, neural architectures,
representation learning. We study what makes models generalize and
when they fail.

### Quantitative Finance
Alpha research, factor models, execution, market microstructure.
Systematic strategies built and backtested against real market data.

### LLM Engineering
Fine-tuning, RAG, evaluation, inference optimization. Applying
language models to real problems with rigorous measurement.

## Links

- Blog: https://blog.tensorbinge.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/tensorbinge
